title: Audiobook
description: Converts a long-form article, PDF, or web page into a narrated audiobook.

title: Chartbeat
description: Pulls real-time top headlines and traffic data from Chartbeat for reuters.com.

title: Cigar Humidor
description: Logs humidity readings, Boveda pack changes, and new cigars to Ben's humidor spreadsheet.

title: Cloudflare Domain Monitor
description: Monitors Ben's domains and logs their DNS, ping, HTTPS, and TLS status.

title: Homepage Charts
description: Logs the graphics that reach the Reuters homepage to Ben's spreadsheet.

title: Kip Blog Post
description: Authors and publishes a new blog post on kip.computer, including lead art generation.

title: Milkdrop
description: Renders a MilkDrop visualization video from an audio file or link.

title: Morning Message
description: Writes Ben's daily Reuters News Apps morning message.

title: Movie List
description: Tracks the films Ben has watched and the ones he wants to see.

title: Music Import
description: Imports new albums into the NAS music library and rescans Kodi.

title: NAS Storage
description: Manages NAS storage, file transfers, disk usage, and drive health.

title: NYC List
description: Tracks the New York City places Ben has visited.

title: Obsidian Vault
description: Deterministic Obsidian vault edits without approval-prone shell/Python by default.

title: Openclaw Releases
description: Checks for new OpenClaw releases and flags when an update is available.

title: Openclaw Pull Requests
description: Guides submitting pull requests to the upstream OpenClaw repository.

title: Pi Diagnostics
description: Reports Raspberry Pi health, temperatures, disk usage, and cron job status.

title: Reading List
description: Tracks the books Ben has finished and the ones he wants to read.

title: Reuters News Bosch
description: Generates Bosch-inspired editorial images from Reuters' most-read stories.

title: Running Log
description: Records the date, distance, route, and reflections from Ben's runs.

title: Speed Tests
description: Runs an internet speed test and logs the results for the public stats page.

title: Todo Cleanup
description: Cleans Todo.md by keeping completed items in one Done section until digest sweep.

title: Twitter Archive
description: Searches Ben's @palewire Twitter archive of tweets, likes, and messages.

title: Voice Transcription
description: Transcribes Telegram voice messages locally with whisper.cpp.

title: Web Archive
description: Saves a web page to the local ArchiveBox instance on the NAS.
